_meta.websockets: none — no Mercure, Pusher, or WebSocket integration found in codebase

_csrf_token.notes: Extracted from login page HTML; token id = 'authenticate'

token.notes: CSRF token for logout; csrf_parameter name is 'token'

user_type[verification].notes: Captcha answer if registration captcha enabled

user_type[_token].notes: Symfony CSRF token extracted from form HTML

response_key_fields: redirect to login link on success

forum_name.notes: Optional; forum slug; can be omitted to pre-select from form field

submission[mediaType].notes: One of: url, image; only present if user can upload images

submission[image].notes: Image file if mediaType=image; multipart/form-data required

submission[forum].notes: Forum name if not in path

submission[_token].notes: Symfony CSRF token from form HTML

id[].notes: Array of flair UUIDs to remove

_format.notes: html or json; use json for AJAX

comment_id.notes: Parent comment ID for reply; omit/null for top-level reply to submission

reply_to_submission_{submissionId}[comme.notes: Form name is 'reply_to_submission_{id}' for top-level, 'reply_to_comment_{id}' for replies; field path 'body'

response_key_fields: redirect to comment anchor on success

confirm_deletion[name].notes: Must equal the forum name exactly

forum_appearance[backgroundImage].notes: Image file; only if user can upload images

moderator_id.notes: Moderator record UUID from moderators list

response_key_fields: redirect to /messages/thread/{id}; thread id from redirect

id.notes: User ID from reset email link

expires.notes: Unix timestamp from reset email link

checksum.notes: HMAC checksum from reset email link

username.notes: Must match authenticated user or admin

user[username].notes: May be disabled if username change not allowed

user[password][first].notes: Optional; leave blank to keep current

id[].notes: Array of notification UUIDs to clear; omit to clear all

ban_user[ips].notes: Comma/newline-separated IP list; auto-populated from user history

ip_ban[user].notes: Optional; username associated with this IP

ban[].notes: Array of IP ban IDs to remove

remove_bad_phrase[].notes: Array of bad phrase UUIDs to remove

path.notes: Wiki page path; can be empty to enter in form

wiki[path].notes: Only present when path is empty

url.notes: URL whose title to fetch; must be a valid URL

body.notes: Comment body markdown; denormalization group: comment:update
